assessor_raw:
## Baseline Assessment: Long-Context Clinical LM vs. TF-IDF for ICD-10 Coding

Very rigorous design. Patient-level chronological split prevents identity leakage. Document parity enforced (same text for both models). Equal tuning effort with per-label threshold optimization on validation. Sliding-window mean-pool addresses long-document context. Fiscal-year subgroup analysis for code update effects. MDC distribution monitoring for case-mix drift. No violations identified.

**Assessment: defense_wins**
